_comments.temperature: 0.1 = near-deterministic for factual Q&A. Raise to 0.3 for more natural phrasing.
_comments.seed: 42 = reproducible outputs for testing. Remove in production if slight variation is OK.
_comments.max_tokens: 1000 covers detailed answers. Lower to 500 for concise mode.
_comments.model: Switch to gpt-4o-mini for 6-17x cost reduction with slight quality trade-off.
